title: Provena: Reproducibility Package for Evidence-Laundering Stress Tests in AI Governance Audits
description: Computational companion to a FAccT-targeted manuscript on context-conditioned evidence sufficiency in AI governance auditing. Implements the Provena epistemic-ceiling framework in Python and validates it through five computational studies on synthetic audit profiles under two data generators (uniform and context-correlated). Includes all 9 auditing baselines, deterministic seeds, and a manuscript-number audit report.
